mapper.select: SELECT log_id, admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, result_status, created_at, target_name, change_detail FROM admin_operation_logs WHERE log_id = #{id}
SELECT log_id, admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, result_status, created_at, target_name, change_detail FROM admin_operation_logs ORDER BY log_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_operation_logs ( admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, result_status, created_at, target_name, change_detail ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{resultStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{targetName}, #{changeDetail} )
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_operation_logs SET admin_id = #{adminId}, action_type = #{actionType}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_name = #{targetName}, change_detail = #{changeDetail}, result_status = #{resultStatus}, target_name = #{targetName}, change_detail = #{changeDetail}, target_type = #{targetType} WHERE log_id = #{logId}
mapper.select:
SELECT l.log_id AS logId, u.email AS adminEmail, u.nickname AS adminNickname, l.target_type AS targetType, l.action_type AS actionType, l.target_id AS targetId, l.result_status AS resultStatus, l.created_at AS createdAt, l.target_name AS targetName, l.change_detail AS changeDetail FROM admin_operation_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.admin_id
ORDER BY l.log_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
